technology.title: Nvidia rolls out its fix for PC gaming's "compiling shaders" wait times
technology.summary: Microsoft, Intel are also working on their own solutions for the issue.

briefing.news_focus: Microsoft, Intel are also working on their own solutions for the issue.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Nvidia推出了針對PC遊戲中「編譯著色器」等待時間的修正方案，並且微軟和英特爾也在針對此問題開發各自的解決方案。
briefing.background: 隨著PC遊戲的普及，著色器編譯的等待時間成為玩家體驗中的一大痛點。Nvidia作為圖形處理器的主要供應商，面對玩家對遊戲流暢度的需求，推出了相應的技術改進。此外，微軟和英特爾的參與顯示出此問題的普遍性，並且反映了業界對提升遊戲性能的重視。
briefing.analysis: Nvidia的修正方案將直接提升其顯示卡的競爭力，可能吸引更多玩家選擇其產品。然而，微軟和英特爾的介入可能會導致市場競爭加劇，三者之間的技術解決方案可能會影響玩家的選擇和遊戲開發者的策略。若各方能夠協同合作，將有助於整體生態系統的改善，但若各自為政，則可能導致技術標準的分歧，影響遊戲性能的整體提升。

supporting_titles: Apple releases security fix for older iPhones and iPads to protect against DarkSword attacks

technology.title: Hasbro investigates cybersecurity incident, takes some systems offline - reuters.com
technology.summary: Hasbro investigates cybersecurity incident, takes some systems offline reuters.com

briefing.news_focus: Hasbro investigates cybersecurity incident, takes some systems offline reuters.com
briefing.news_focus_zh: 玩具公司哈斯布羅（Hasbro）正在調查一起網絡安全事件，並已將部分系統下線以防止進一步損害。
briefing.background: 哈斯布羅是全球知名的玩具和娛樂公司，擁有多個知名品牌。隨著數字化轉型的加速，企業面臨的網絡安全威脅日益增加。過去幾年，許多大型企業遭受過類似的網絡攻擊，這使得企業在數據保護和系統安全方面的投資變得尤為重要。此次事件可能會影響哈斯布羅的運營效率及其品牌形象，尤其是在假期銷售季節來臨之際。
briefing.analysis: 此次網絡安全事件對哈斯布羅的影響可能是多方面的。首先，公司的運營可能會受到影響，尤其是在供應鏈和客戶服務方面。其次，消費者對品牌的信任可能會受到損害，這在競爭激烈的玩具市場中尤為重要。此外，哈斯布羅需要與網絡安全專家合作，評估事件的範圍和影響，並制定相應的應對措施。投資於網絡安全基礎設施將成為未來的重點。

technology.title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open source LiteLLM project
technology.summary: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

briefing.news_focus: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.
briefing.news_focus_zh: AI招聘初創公司Mercor確認遭受網路攻擊，黑客團體聲稱竊取了公司的數據，並與開源LiteLLM項目的安全漏洞有關。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的快速發展，AI招聘工具的需求日益增加。然而，開源項目的安全性問題也隨之浮現，LiteLLM作為一個開源項目，曾受到廣泛關注。Mercor的事件突顯了開源軟體在商業應用中的潛在風險，尤其是在數據安全和隱私方面。這一事件也反映出科技行業對於網路安全的脆弱性，特別是在資金和資源有限的初創公司中。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件標誌著Mercor在安全防護上的重大失誤，因為這次攻擊與開源LiteLLM項目的漏洞直接相關，顯示出開源軟體的安全性問題可能對商業運作造成實質影響。這不僅影響Mercor的商業信譽，也可能引發客戶對其數據保護能力的質疑。隨著黑客團體的聲明，可能會引發更多針對其他使用LiteLLM的公司的攻擊，進一步擴大影響範圍，並促使業界加強對開源項目的安全審查。

supporting_titles: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack

politics.title: ‘Weak and pathetic’: why is the EU not using its leverage to stop Israel?
politics.summary: Deep divisions on Israel mean the union has failed to act over Lebanon, Gaza, or settler violence in the West Bank The human costs of Israel’s attacks on Lebanon were plain to see when the Irish MEP Barry Andrews visited Beirut last month. He met people who had fled Israeli airstrikes and complied with evacuation orders in southern Lebanon. At makeshift shelters – converted schools – conditions were even worse than during Israel’s last incursion in 2024, he was told. “There are dirty mattresses, dirty blankets, [people] are getting infections, they are getting rashes,” he said recalling a picture of misery compounded by swingeing aid budget cuts . Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Deep divisions on Israel mean the union has failed to act over Lebanon, Gaza, or settler violence in the West Bank The human costs of Israel’s attacks on Lebanon were plain to see when the Irish MEP Barry Andrews visited Beirut last month. He met people who had fled Israeli airstrikes and complied with evacuation orders in southern Lebanon. At makeshift shelters – converted schools – conditions were even worse than during Israel’s last incursion in 2024, he was told. “There are dirty mattresses, dirty blankets, [people] are getting infections, they are getting rashes,” he said recalling a picture of misery compounded by swingeing aid budget cuts . Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐盟因內部對以色列政策的深刻分歧，未能有效利用其影響力來制止以色列在黎巴嫩、加沙及西岸的暴力行為，導致人道危機加劇。
briefing.background: 歐盟在中東政策上長期存在分歧，特別是在以色列與巴勒斯坦衝突的應對上。部分成員國如愛爾蘭對以色列的行為持批評態度，而其他國家則較為支持以色列。這種分歧使得歐盟在面對以色列的軍事行動時，無法形成統一的立場，進而影響其對外政策的有效性。
briefing.analysis: 歐盟內部的分歧使得其在以色列問題上的影響力大打折扣，這對於人道主義援助和地區穩定造成負面影響。愛爾蘭等國的呼聲未能獲得足夠支持，反映出歐盟在應對人道危機時的無力感。未來，若無法統一立場，歐盟可能會在國際舞台上失去更多的話語權，並可能導致其他國家對其政策的質疑。

briefing.news_focus_zh: 報導指出，前美國拜登政府官員預測特朗普與習近平的峰會將會非常友好，因為特朗普專注於短期成果，而習近平則追求雙邊穩定，這可能促成一場異常和諧的會議。
briefing.background: 美中關係在過去幾年中經歷了顯著的緊張，尤其是在貿易、科技與地緣政治方面。特朗普政府時期的貿易戰使兩國關係降至低點，而拜登政府則試圖重建對話平台。習近平在國內外政策上強調穩定，尤其是在面對經濟挑戰的背景下，雙方的會晤被視為改善關係的重要機會。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普與習近平的峰會可能會受到多方利益的影響。特朗普希望透過短期成果來提升其政治形象，而習近平則需要展現其在國際舞台上的領導力。美國內部對於與中國的關係存在分歧，部分人士擔心過於友好的會議可能會削弱對中國的強硬立場。相對而言，中國則希望藉此機會緩解外部壓力，促進經濟復甦。

politics.title: European concerns over US commitment to Nato persist after Trump’s criticisms – Europe live
politics.summary: After threatening to withdraw from the alliance, the president did not mention it in his address to the nation, and will meet the secretary general, Mark Rutte, next week Meanwhile, Lithuanian prosecutor general Nida Grunskienė said she would request legal assistance from the US as the country continues a pre-trial investigation into potential human trafficking offences triggered by the release of Jeffrey Epstein’s correspondence. The investigation was launched in February after several central and eastern European countries raised concerns about reports linking alleged Epstein’s associates with the region. Latvia and Poland also opened their separate inquiries. Continue reading...

Latvia and Poland also opened their separate inquiries. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統在國內演說中未提及北約，令歐洲對美國對北約的承諾持續感到擔憂。立陶宛檢察總長則要求美國提供法律協助，調查與性交易有關的案件，該案件與傑弗瑞·愛潑斯坦的通信有關。
briefing.background: 自特朗普任內以來，美國對北約的態度變得不穩定，特朗普曾威脅退出該聯盟，這引發歐洲國家的擔憂。北約作為歐洲安全的基石，其穩定性對於防範外部威脅至關重要。此外，立陶宛等國對愛潑斯坦事件的調查反映出該地區對人權和法律正義的重視，並可能影響其與美國的法律合作。
briefing.analysis: 美國對北約的承諾不明確使得歐洲國家感到不安，特別是在安全形勢日益緊張的背景下。立陶宛要求美國協助調查，顯示出該國希望加強與美國的法律合作，並借此提升自身的國際形象。另一方面，拉脫維亞和波蘭的獨立調查也表明，這一事件在中東歐地區引發了廣泛的關注，可能會影響這些國家的外交政策及其與美國的關係。

supporting_titles: What do Trump's latest comments on leaving Nato mean for the alliance?
Smoke and embers seen over Iran’s Isfahan after strike

economy.title: Iran war may increase mortgage payments for extra 1.3m households, says Bank of England
economy.summary: Financial policy committee predicts ‘Trumpflation’ rises, as average two-year fixed rate hits 5.84% Business live – latest updates The US-Israel war on Iran could end up increasing monthly mortgage payments for more than one million more UK households, the Bank of England has predicted, adding that the conflict had dealt “a substantial negative supply shock” to the world economy. Financial market jitters over the conflict in the Middle East have resulted in banks pulling about 1,500 mortgage products, with many banks raising interest rates on their remaining 7,000 home loan products in recent weeks, the Bank’s financial policy committee (FPC) said. Continue reading...

Financial market jitters over the conflict in the Middle East have resulted in banks pulling about 1,500 mortgage products, with many banks raising interest rates on their remaining 7,000 home loan products in recent weeks, the Bank’s financial policy committee (FPC) said. briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國央行預測，由於美國與以色列對伊朗的衝突，將使超過130萬家庭的按揭月供上升，並造成全球經濟的重大供應衝擊。
briefing.background: 近期的美國與以色列對伊朗的軍事行動引發了全球金融市場的不安，導致英國的銀行業出現信貸緊縮。根據英國央行的報告，這場衝突不僅影響了能源價格，還造成了按揭產品的減少和利率的上升。隨著固定利率按揭的平均利率達到5.84%，許多家庭面臨更高的貸款成本，這可能進一步影響英國的住房市場和消費者支出。
briefing.analysis: 這場衝突對英國家庭的財務狀況造成了直接影響，特別是中低收入家庭將面臨更大的經濟壓力。銀行為了應對市場不確定性，已經開始收緊貸款條件，這可能導致更多家庭無法獲得按揭貸款。英國央行的預測顯示，若衝突持續，可能會引發更廣泛的經濟後果，包括消費者信心下降和經濟增長放緩。各方利益關係中，家庭借款人將是最受影響的一方，而銀行則可能因利率上升而獲利。

supporting_titles: Oil jumps nearly 7% after Trump says US to keep up attacks on Iran - reuters.com
Warning Iran war 'shock' could push up mortgages for 1.3m homeowners
How Iran is making a mint from Donald Trump’s war
JAL and ANA to double surcharges as Iran war drives up fuel prices

economy.title: A year on: Four ways Trump's tariffs have changed the global economy
economy.summary: US tariffs stand at the highest rate in decades. But what has the impact been?

briefing.news_focus: US tariffs stand at the highest rate in decades. But what has the impact been?
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國的關稅在數十年來達到最高水平，這一政策對全球經濟產生了深遠影響，值得深入探討其具體變化。
briefing.background: 自特朗普政府於2018年實施高額關稅以來，全球貿易格局發生了顯著變化。這些關稅主要針對中國及其他國家，旨在減少美國的貿易赤字並保護本國產業。隨著關稅的提高，許多國家被迫調整其貿易策略，並尋求新的市場或供應鏈，以應對美國的貿易政策。這一政策也引發了其他國家的報復性關稅，進一步加劇了全球貿易緊張局勢。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的關稅政策對不同利益方造成了不同影響。美國製造業可能因保護措施而受益，但消費者則因價格上漲而面臨更高的生活成本。中國及其他受影響國家則努力尋找替代市場，並加強與其他經濟體的合作。此外，全球供應鏈的重組可能會導致長期的經濟結構變化，影響未來的貿易協議和國際關係。各國政府和企業需密切關注這些變化，以調整其經營策略。

supporting_titles: Trump’s trade war put the UK on the back foot. His actual war may break us | Larry Elliott
A New York vintner raids US wine cellars to skirt Trump's tariffs - reuters.com
Donald Trump’s Greenland tariffs are no great blow to Europe

economy.title: A third inflationary shock in less than a decade is coming: who will pay the price this time around? | Aditya Chakrabortty
economy.summary: Brutal past experience has taught us that a cost of living crisis doesn’t affect us all the same, because we don’t all go into it with the same income or wealth Perhaps the most celebrated writer on oil markets is Daniel Yergin. His work has won a Pulitzer and his advice sought by every president from Bill Clinton to Donald Trump. Let’s start by looking at an example. Fifteen years ago, before the US and Israel started their war on Iran, killing thousands of civilians in the process, before the strait of Hormuz became as infamous as the Bermuda Triangle, and before experts declared “the greatest global energy security threat in history”, Yergin published The Quest : Energy, Security and the Remaking of the Modern World. After hearing Trump announce a “very soon” end to the conflict for the second – or was it the third? – time, I dug out my copy. Just as I remembered, it devotes a chapter to the Persian Gulf. Aditya Chakrabortty is a Guardian columnist Do you have an opinion on the issues raised in this article? If you would like to submit a response of up to 300 words by email to be considered for publication in our letters section, please click here . Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 本則新聞探討了即將到來的第三次通脹衝擊，並指出生活成本危機對不同收入與財富階層的影響不均，特別是過去的經驗教訓了我們這一點。
briefing.background: 在過去十年內，全球經濟經歷了多次通脹衝擊，這些衝擊往往與地緣政治事件、能源市場波動及政策變化有關。特別是中東地區的衝突，如美國與伊朗的緊張關係，對全球能源供應鏈造成了深遠影響。這些因素使得生活成本上升，並加劇了社會經濟不平等，因為不同收入群體面對的挑戰與資源承受能力各異。
briefing.analysis: 此次通脹衝擊可能會再次加深社會分化，低收入家庭將面臨更大的生活壓力，而高收入者則相對能夠承受這些變化。政府與政策制定者需考慮如何平衡經濟增長與社會公平，否則可能引發更大規模的社會不滿與抗議。此外，能源市場的波動將影響企業成本，進一步影響消費者價格，形成惡性循環。

supporting_titles: US petrol price tops $4 for first time since 2022

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體敘事主軸圍繞著科技、政治與經濟三個領域的互動與影響。科技版面中，Nvidia及其他公司針對遊戲性能與網絡安全事件的應對，顯示出科技行業在面對挑戰時的快速反應，而這些挑戰也可能對經濟活動產生潛在影響。政治版面則聚焦於歐盟與美國的外交動態，特別是美國對北約的承諾問題，這與經濟版面中提到的全球經濟風險密切相關，特別是在面對可能的通脹衝擊與地緣政治緊張局勢的背景下，將影響家庭的經濟負擔。
